concept: Bridge / Spanning Structure / To Connect Across
description: A structure spanning and providing passage over gap, river, or road; to connect separated places. 'Repha' names what reaches across—the span that joins what was divided.
sound_symbolism: The word spans open. 'Re' reaches across the gap, connection extending. Then 'ha' /ɸa/ breathes with open span, bridge complete.
grammatical_notes: Functions as noun: 'lo repha' (the bridge). As verb: 'mi repha' (I bridge). Both physical bridges and metaphorical bridging of differences.

pillars.peace-linguistics-practices: Bridging divides—connection across difference, finding common ground over separation.
pillars.secular-buddhist-philosophy: Bridge as skillful means—creating passage where none existed, enabling crossing.
